title: Cold Temperatures Expected Through Thursday
summary: The Charlotte area will experience freezing temperatures each night through Thursday morning.
charlotte_impact: Extended cold can impact vulnerable populations and increase energy consumption for heating.

title: Water Gun Incident Triggers School Lockdown
summary: A South Iredell High School lockdown occurred after a water gun was mistaken for a pistol during a social media game.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the heightened sensitivity around school safety and the potential consequences of social media trends.

title: Gaston County Man Wins $100,000 Lottery
summary: David Abernathy won $100,000 on a lottery ticket purchased at Main Street Market in Stanley.
charlotte_impact: Lottery wins provide individual financial boosts and contribute to state revenue.

title: Storm Cleanup: Hidden Dangers Warning
summary: Emergency crews warn of injuries occurring during storm cleanup efforts after severe weather.
charlotte_impact: Emphasizes the importance of safety precautions during post-storm recovery.

title: Charlotte Seeks Resident Input on Budget
summary: Charlotte leaders are initiating the planning process for the fiscal year 2027 budget, starting with a Budget 101 session.
charlotte_impact: Citizen involvement is crucial for transparent and responsive governance.

title: Police Investigate Death at Mental Health Facility
summary: Authorities are investigating the death of a girl at Cornerstone Treatment Facility in Anson County.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about safety and oversight in mental health facilities.

title: Protests Over Silfab Solar Plant Operations
summary: Protesters in York County demand revocation of Silfab Solar's certificate due to chemical incidents and zoning concerns.
charlotte_impact: Highlights community concerns about environmental safety and industrial regulation.

title: Teen Charged in Fatal Shooting of Mother's Boyfriend
summary: A Lancaster County teen is charged with killing his mother's boyfriend after an argument escalated.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the tragic consequences of domestic disputes and gun violence.

title: Family Sues Day Care Employee in Toddler's Death
summary: The family of a 16-month-old girl who died at a Lenoir daycare is suing a former employee charged with involuntary manslaughter.
charlotte_impact: Addresses accountability and negligence in childcare settings.

title: Racial Disparities in Infant Mortality Persist
summary: A report shows Black infants in Mecklenburg County suffer higher mortality rates despite overall improvements.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the urgent need to address systemic inequities in healthcare access and outcomes.

title: Tree Falls: Who Is Responsible?
summary: Severe thunderstorms toppled trees and power lines across the Charlotte area, raising questions of property owner liability.
charlotte_impact: Clarifies legal responsibilities related to tree damage during storms.

title: Former Councilmembers Launch Government-Relations Firm
summary: Ex-Charlotte councilmembers Tariq Bokhari and Larken Egleston are leading the Charlotte branch of The Southern Group.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the revolving door between public service and private sector lobbying.

title: Morganton Man Killed in I-40 Rollover
summary: Lee Glover died in a rollover crash on I-40 in Iredell County after his vehicle ran off the road.
charlotte_impact: Serves as a reminder of the dangers of highway driving.

title: Tornado Confirmed at Charlotte Warehouse
summary: The National Weather Service confirmed that an EF0 tornado hit a warehouse in northeast Charlotte during Monday's storms.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the increasing frequency and impact of severe weather events.

title: Felony Suspect Arrested Outside Food Lion
summary: A man wanted for multiple felonies was arrested outside a Hickory Food Lion after officers forced entry into his vehicle.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates law enforcement efforts to apprehend wanted criminals.
